title: Purchase Classifications
description: A user defined list of purchase classifications (e.g. hazardous, infectious material, etc.).

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the purchase classification.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the purchase classification.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the purchase classification.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code that may be used to identify a purchase classification.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The first date when the purchase classification is valid.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The last date when the purchase classification is valid.
